cases.name: tie--equal-stage-capacities--all

cases.name: labour--allocation-over-100
cases.note: Allocations sum to 135 per cent. The model scales on them regardless. Deliberate: the UI warns rather than clamps.

cases.name: labour--distinct-shares--seas1
cases.note: Quarry, transport, dressing, and placement shares are all different, so each scalar is independently pinned in both the seasonal and non-seasonal branches.

cases.name: labour--distinct-shares--seas0
cases.note: Quarry, transport, dressing, and placement shares are all different, so each scalar is independently pinned in both the seasonal and non-seasonal branches.

cases.name: labour--allocation-over-100--nonseasonal
cases.note: As the seasonal over-allocation case, against the non-seasonal capacity branch.

cases.name: edge--empty-scope
cases.note: No enabled structures returns a zeroed summary and no rows.

cases.name: edge--same-year-dates
cases.note: sy === ey. Normalisation allows N=1 but the annual loop exits on dur<=0, so demand is zero. The chronology guard in setStruct enforces a minimum one-year span, so this state is no longer reachable from the interface. Retained as a defensive record for programmatic callers.

cases.name: edge--reversed-dates
cases.note: ey < sy reaches the ty<=0 guard and returns an empty programme. The chronology guard in setStruct now prevents the sliders producing this, so it is unreachable from the interface. Retained as a defensive record for programmatic callers.
